title: vanda boxallii
intro: Vanda boxallii, also known as Boxall's Vanda, is a type of orchid species native to the tropical forests of the Western Ghats in India. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vanda boxallii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even help with wound healing. Herbal preparations of Vanda boxallii can be made by infusing the flowers or leaves in hot water to create teas or decoctions for medicinal use.
